title: Jailhouse Rock
meaning_summary: Jailhouse Rock still generates value because it remains one of the most instantly recognizable recordings from the first era of global rock and roll.
revenue_drivers: Classic-film and rock-history relevance keep the song culturally active.
Playlist and nostalgia demand support steady long-tail streaming.
Estate-managed licensing and media reuse extend commercial life.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes durable classic-rock usage, high recognition, and continuing licensing-style reuse.

ownership.master_owner: Estate and legacy rights-holder structure assumed
ownership.publishing_owner: Composition-side rights assumed to be distinct from performer economics
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No new catalog sale adjustment assumed
ownership.notes: This is a modeled estate-side estimate based on very strong historical recognition rather than disclosed royalty data.
